name: Support Notification Agent
desc: Real-time case pattern detection. P1 concentrations, stale cases, misrouted tickets, SLA-only responses, cross-agent escalation.

name: CSQL Intelligence Hub
desc: AI-powered Customer Success Qualified Lead workspace. Expansion signal detection, health-scored accounts, rich CSQL creation with QBR extraction, pipeline tracking, and CS revenue attribution.

name: Agentic AI x Guided CSM Journey
desc: Interactive mapping of agentic AI workflows across the 5-stage CSM lifecycle (Onboard, Engage, Adopt, Monitor, Expand). Four AI modes taxonomy, before/after comparisons, time savings metrics, OOB vs custom build analysis.

name: CSA Exam Prep
desc: 60-question ServiceNow CSA practice bank. Domain-filtered, scored, with full right/wrong explanations per question. Mapped to official Zurich blueprint weightings.

name: Guided CSM Agent — Acceleration Roadmap
desc: Interactive acceleration roadmap for the Guided CSM Agent. Phase-by-phase build plan, milestones, JTBD/CXJ mapping, and agent details across 10 agents.

name: Product Adoption Dashboard
desc: Single-page product health view with narrative flow. Health verdict, prioritized focus areas, BU breakdown, critical/all app toggle, utilization by BU and meter, full methodology documentation.

name: Claude Code for Product Managers
desc: Interactive guide to using Claude Code as a PM. Tabbed use cases (Build, Analyze, Automate, Understand) with copy-pasteable prompts and power tips.

name: Support Intelligence Agent — Prototype
desc: Clickable CSP prototype showing V1 support snapshot in sidebar and V2 full Support Intelligence tab with critical cases, stuck cases, upcoming changes, relationship context, and all open cases table.
